site.name: Thrivea
site.title: Thrivea Status
site.tagline: Live and historical status of the Thrivea platform.

components.name: Application API
components.description: Core gRPC/REST API that the Thrivea web app talks to.

components.name: Authentication & SSO
components.description: Sign-in, identity, single sign-on and workspace federation.

components.name: Social Feed
components.description: Company feed, posts, audience and messaging.

components.name: HR & Organization
components.description: Employee records, jobs, compensation and workflows.

updates.body: Automated monitoring detected that Background Jobs is unreachable / failing health checks. Our team has been alerted.
Automated monitoring detected that Database is unreachable / failing health checks. Our team has been alerted.
Automated monitoring detected that Notifications & Email is unreachable / failing health checks. Our team has been alerted.
Automated monitoring detected that HR & Organization is unreachable / failing health checks. Our team has been alerted.
Automated monitoring detected that Social Feed is unreachable / failing health checks. Our team has been alerted.
Automated monitoring detected that Authentication & SSO is unreachable / failing health checks. Our team has been alerted.
Automated monitoring detected that Application API is unreachable / failing health checks. Our team has been alerted.

We have identified the cause: the application is currently unable to reach its database, so the platform is unavailable. The database itself is healthy; we are working to restore connectivity as our top priority.

We are investigating elevated errors and failed or slow requests affecting some users, related to database connectivity. Parts of the app may be intermittently unavailable. We will post updates as we learn more.
